# Military Events — 1777

Battles and campaigns of the American Revolutionary War and beyond.

| [Battles of Saratoga](battles-of-saratoga.md) | Two-battle American victory in autumn 1777 — Freeman's Farm and Bemis Heights — culminating in Burgoyne's surrender and France's entry into the war. |
